sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48279" key="qeopro/splokos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θεο-πρόσπλοκος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n48279.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">very religious</tr_>, as <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">gloss on </lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἱεροπρόσπολος</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg022:224" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Par.Ptol.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">224</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
